title: entkapp Configuration Schema
description: Configuration schema for entkapp Ultimate - The Enterprise Codebase Janitor

useBuiltinPlugins.description: Whether to load the built-in ecosystem plugins (Next.js, Vite, etc.).

useCustomPlugins.description: Whether to load plugins from the local /entkapp/plugins directory.

verbose.description: Enable detailed trace logging for debugging.

fastMode.description: Use the OXC (Rust) parser for high-speed analysis.

selfHealing.description: Enable automated structural healing and pruning.

enabledPlugins.description: Explicit list of plugins to activate.

ignoreDependencies.description: Dependencies that should never be reported as unused. Supports glob patterns like '@types/*'.

exclude.description: Glob patterns of directories or files to ignore during analysis.

entryPoints.description: Explicit entry point files to protect from orphan detection. Supports glob patterns.

enabled.description: Force-enable monorepo workspace mode (auto-detected from package.json workspaces or pnpm-workspace.yaml).

ignoredPackages.description: Workspace packages to exclude from analysis.

enforcePackageBoundaries.description: Report errors when a workspace package imports another without declaring it as a dependency.

checkVersionMismatches.description: Report warnings when the same dependency has different versions across workspace packages.

filename.description: Path to the root tsconfig.json file.

followProjectReferences.description: Follow TypeScript project references to discover workspace packages.

resolveAliases.description: Use tsconfig paths/baseUrl to resolve module aliases.

scanWorkspaceScripts.description: Also scan package.json scripts in all workspace packages (not just root).

scanCIWorkflows.description: Scan .github/workflows YAML files for tool usage.

scanConfigFiles.description: Detect tool usage from config files (vite.config.ts, jest.config.js, etc.).
